---
title: "Sir Benjamin Collins Brodie 1st Bt."
---

## Sir Benjamin Collins Brodie 1st Bt.

**Dates:** (1783-1862)

### Description

physician

### Biography

He was created a baronet in 1834. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Otterbourn [5 January 1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
